articles.title: Chamath Palihapitiya raises $135M Series A for his AI coding startup, takes CEO role
articles.description: VCs remain thirsty to fund AI coding startups. This one, founded by investor Chamath Palihapitiya, is no exception.
articles.author: Julie Bort

articles.title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
articles.description: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your
articles.author: Lauren Forristal

articles.title: Watch out, Amazon: The Kobo eReader now has a Goodreads rival
articles.description: Kobo users can now automatically sync their reading progress to StoryGraph, making it easier to track books, reading stats, and challenges without
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Waymo and Uber quietly part ways in Phoenix
articles.description: Uber said it is readying the launch of a separate autonomous vehicle partnership in the city, but did not name the partner.
articles.author: Sean O'Kane

articles.title: Anthropic and Gov. Newsom forge deal allowing California government to use Claude at half price
articles.description: As Anthropic forges a closer relationship with the state of California, the federal government has made an enemy out of the OpenAI rival.
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: South Korean tech giants commit over $550B to ease ‘RAMageddon’
articles.description: The world's two largest memory chip companies vow to build more memory lab fabs as South Korea positions itself as an AI tech powerhouse country.
articles.author: Kate Park

articles.title: Arena, the AI leaderboard everyone uses, is now a $100M business
articles.description: The startup, which runs a popular free AI leaderboard, launched its commercial service just last September.
articles.author: Marina Temkin

articles.title: Cursor now has a mobile app for guiding your coding agent on the go
articles.description: Cursor has launched a new mobile app for remote oversight over coding agents.
articles.author: Russell Brandom

articles.title: Trump administration threatens 92 GW of new electricity supply with red tape
articles.description: The Trump administration's moves threaten $121 billion in new solar and wind power, two energy sources that are the biggest contributors to new
articles.author: Tim De Chant

articles.title: TIDAL cracks down on AI music by cutting off monetization
articles.description: In addition, TIDAL will use automated tools to remove AI-generated music that attempts to impersonate an artist or a group, the company said.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: In major privacy win, Supreme Court rules geofence warrants are protected by privacy rights
articles.description: The Supreme Court's decision to limit geofence warrants is a win for privacy advocates, who called their use unconstitutional but sought an outright
articles.author: Zack Whittaker, Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai

articles.title: WhatsApp now lets you reserve usernames
articles.description: WhatsApp username can be between 3 to 35 characters.
articles.author: Ivan Mehta

articles.title: Rocket Lab continues buying spree by acquiring satellite company Iridium
articles.description: The all-stock deal values Iridium at $8 billion and gives Rocket Lab even more firepower to compete against Amazon and SpaceX.
articles.author: Sean O'Kane

articles.title: Robot hand company settles Tesla trade secret suit and announces $11M raise
articles.description: The startup, Proception, is taking a unique approach to collecting training data to tackle one of the hardest problems in robotics: hands.
articles.author: Sean O'Kane

articles.title: Pocket raises $11M in bet on rising demand for AI note-taking devices
articles.description: Pocket sells a $129 credit card-shaped puck, which sticks to the back of your phone, and promises unlimited recordings, transcriptions, and to-do
articles.author: Ivan Mehta

articles.title: Flipper Device’s new Busy Bar is a customizable display for productivity
articles.description: The company's productivity-focused gadget helps you set timers, block apps, and display custom messages and widgets on an LED display.
articles.author: Ivan Mehta

articles.title: Omen AI’s plan to optimize data centers is all wet
articles.description: Omen AI raised a $31 million Series A to monitor chip coolant and stop bacterial outbreaks in data centers.
articles.author: Tim Fernholz
